scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter reeckon build && pnpm --filter create-reeckon build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @reeckon/web check && pnpm --filter reeckon typecheck && pnpm --filter create-reeckon typecheck
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @reeckon/web typecheck && pnpm --filter reeckon typecheck && pnpm --filter create-reeckon typecheck
